title: Guilded
description: Guilded: a datapack that adds guilds and other things around the world
body:
# GUILDED

## INFO

#### Adds guilds, outposts, and more around the world

#### I am always open to anyone who wants to contribute, contact me on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/understar46/)

#### Finished in V0.5 updates:
- Farming Guild
- Mining Guild
- Adventure Guild
- Wandering Traders/Tent

### Datapack is UNFINISHED

## IMPORTANT
﻿Try to read everything said in chat, it may be important

Works best on singleplayer


DATAPACK IS LABELED WRONG. 1.21+ ONLY

## FUTURE

#### UPDATE PROGRESS BAR(estimate)

⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛

#### WHAT TO EXPECT IN V0.5.2
 - Fully remade OG content
 - At least one new guild
 - Mob raids


- More Structure Functionality
### SPECIAL THANKS
peA_sh0ter

[waffle_puppy13](https://www.youtube.com/@waffle_puppy13)﻿ - play tester 

SwftThunder_ - play tester
